zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de la Spine於1381年出生時，她的父親Sir Guy de la Spine21歲，母親Lady Katherine Holt27歲。她和Sir William de Tracy II至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1441年享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de la Spine于1381年出生时，她的父亲Sir Guy de la Spine21岁，母亲Lady Katherine Holt27岁。她和Sir William de Tracy II至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1441年享年60岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Spine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Pasquale, Rocco, Sebastiano, Antonio, Carmine, Carmino, Emidio, Nichola, Nicola, Sando.
Italian: nickname from the Greek adjective spinos ‘thin, spindly’ or the noun spinos ‘linnet’.
Italian: habitational name from any of various places so named, for example Spino d'Adda in Cremona province.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de la Spine was born in 1381, her father, Sir Guy de la Spine, was 21 and her mother, Lady Katherine Holt, was 27. She had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Sir William de Tracy II. She died in 1441, at the age of 60, and was buried in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de la Spine est née en 1381, son père, Sir Guy de la Spine, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Lady Katherine Holt, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Sir William de Tracy II. Elle est décédée en 1441, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Toddington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de la Spine 1381 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Guy de la Spine 21 und ihre Mutter Lady Katherine Holt 27. Sie hatte mit Sir William de Tracy II mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1441 im Alter von 60 Jahren und wurde in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de la Spine è nata il nel 1381, sua padre, Sir Guy de la Spine, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Lady Katherine Holt, aveva 27 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Sir William de Tracy II. Morì nel 1441, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de la Spineが1381年に生まれた時，父Sir Guy de la Spineは21歳，母Lady Katherine Holtは27歳であった。彼女はSir William de Tracy IIとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1441年に60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアトッドイントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de la Spine(이)가 1381년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Guy de la Spine(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Katherine Holt(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Sir William de Tracy II(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1441년 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 토딩턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de la Spine nasceu em 1381, seu pai, Sir Guy de la Spine, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Lady Katherine Holt, tinha 27 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Sir William de Tracy II. Ela faleceu em 1441, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de la Spine родилась в 1381 г., её отцу по имени Sir Guy de la Spine было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Katherine Holt, 27. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Sir William de Tracy II. Она умерла в 1441 г. в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности тоддингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de la Spine nació en 1381, su papá, Sir Guy de la Spine, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Lady Katherine Holt, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con Sir William de Tracy II. Murió en 1441, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
